body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `NVTX` package from `0.3` to `0.3, 1`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for NVTX to 1, (keep existing compat)

body:
<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

This PR closes #2193, which was accidentally introduced in #2136 while I was experimenting with extruded DSS weights. DSS should now work correctly for all types of Fields.

title: Fix bug in DSS of level Fields
